## Scope check

Please confirm the request is in scope (see CONTRIBUTING.md for details):

- [ ] Does not require a Windows-native build (WSL is the supported path)
- [ ] Does not involve verbatim Zipfel or CADAC++ source code
- [ ] Does not require proprietary aerodynamic data


## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting

<!-- Related issues, prior art, papers, anything else. -->
